description.en: Purge cached content for a Cloudflare zone. Purge everything or specific URLs.
description.de: Gecachte Inhalte für eine Cloudflare-Zone leeren. Alles oder bestimmte URLs leeren.
description.es: Purge cached content for a Cloudflare zone. Purge everything or specific URLs.
description.fr: Purge cached content for a Cloudflare zone. Purge everything or specific URLs.
description.ro: Purge cached content for a Cloudflare zone. Purge everything or specific URLs.
description.it: Purge cached content for a Cloudflare zone. Purge everything or specific URLs.

vars.API_TOKEN: env:CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN|Get your API token from Cloudflare Dashboard > My Profile > API Tokens.

inputs.name: Purge Everything

description.en: Set to true to purge all cached content.
description.es: Set to true to purge all cached content.
description.fr: Set to true to purge all cached content.
description.ro: Set to true to purge all cached content.
description.it: Set to true to purge all cached content.

inputs.bot: Set to true to purge everything. If false, provide specific files to purge.

inputs.name: Files

description.en: JSON array of URLs to purge (if not purging everything).
description.es: JSON array of URLs to purge (if not purging everything).
description.fr: JSON array of URLs to purge (if not purging everything).
description.ro: JSON array of URLs to purge (if not purging everything).
description.it: JSON array of URLs to purge (if not purging everything).

inputs.bot: Optional JSON array of specific URLs to purge. Example: ["https://example.com/style.css"]
